# Sam (@ifeelsam)

> Full-stack Solana engineer and builder. Currently building Mortem (agent trading observability on Solana). Arcium Fellow and 2× Superteam grant recipient. Works across privacy-preserving finance, AI agent observability, and polished TypeScript/Next.js interfaces.

## About
- Name: Sam 
- Handle: @ifeelsam (GitHub and X)
- Role: Full-stack Solana engineer & builder
- Location: India
- Stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Solana, EVM, Kotlin, Rust, Tailwind

## Links
- Portfolio: https://ifeelsam.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/ifeelsam
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/ifeelsam

## Selected projects
- Mortem Protocol (building) — Catch bad agent trading decisions on Solana; trace failures, prove root cause, fix the logic. https://github.com/mortemlabs/mortem-protocol — demo https://www.mortemlabs.com
- CipherScore (live) — Privacy-first credit scoring; verifiable scores without exposing raw financial data. https://github.com/ifeelsam/CipherScore
- PikaVault (live) — Vault frontend with wallet flows and production-ready deposits. https://github.com/ifeelsam/pika-fe
- AvenoX (live) — Wallet-gated deployment dashboard on Sui. https://github.com/ifeelsam/avenox
- Vynix (live) — RWA marketplace for collectibles. https://github.com/ifeelsam/Vynix
- Tracer (live) — Observability and debugging for TypeScript AI agents on EVM. https://github.com/ifeelsam/Tracer
- OuterTune (live) — Material 3 Android music player. https://github.com/ifeelsam/OuterTune
- Kord (live) — Protocol documentation and developer experience site. https://github.com/ifeelsam/Kord-docs

## Experience
- Arcium Fellowship (Jul–Aug 2025) — Built privacy-preserving applications on Solana using confidential MPC.
- Superteam (2024–present) — Member and 2× grant recipient in the Solana ecosystem.
- Solana Turbin3 (2024) — Builder cohort graduate; Solana architecture and mainnet shipping.
- Open source (2023–present) — Maintainer and contributor across DeFi, AI agent observability, and Android.
